chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1471 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 20.10.2017. Mr. Muhammad Ramzan Chandio, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. alongwith Muhammad Saleem P.S Badin and ASI Sikander Ali P.S B-Section Latifabad. Learned Counsel for the petitioners has, inter alia, contended that the petitioners are being harassed by the police officials at the instance of private respondents on account of their freewill marriage. Learned A.A.G has filed comments of respondents No.2 and 3 denying the allegation of causing harassment to the petitioners. Learned A.A.G further undertakes that due protection in accordance with law will be provided to the petitioners as and when they approach the police officials concerned, which has satisfied the learned Counsel for petitioner who seeks disposal of this petition in the said terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the said terms. JUDGE Ali Haider
